_comment: Apply this analysisPlan to the Vapi assistant via dashboard or API PATCH. The structuredDataSchema fields map directly to the intake-lead edge function payload. The n8n workflow (wf5) reads from body.message.analysis.structuredData.

analysisPlan.structuredDataPrompt: Extract the following from the call transcript. Use null for any field the caller did not provide.

caller_phone.description: Phone number provided by caller (if different from caller ID)

caller_email.description: Email address if provided, else null

service_type.description: Service package the caller is interested in

job_description.description: Description of the job or property

preferred_date.description: Preferred service date in YYYY-MM-DD format
